nodes.context: Loosely connected criminal organizations operating in Ukraine, involved in drug trafficking, arms smuggling, money laundering, extortion, and corruption.
Italian mafia-type organization based in Naples, involved in cigarette smuggling and other illegal activities.
A clan of the Camorra, involved in cigarette smuggling cooperation with Ukrainian groups.
Ukrainian organized crime group based in Odesa, involved in drug and arms trafficking, active in US, Israel, and Europe.
Russian organized crime groups that cooperate with Ukrainian gangs in heroin trafficking and other activities.
Network of illegal miners, smugglers, corrupt officials, and armed groups involved in illegal amber mining in northwestern Ukraine.
Ukrainian drug trafficking group producing and distributing methamphetamine, cannabis, and PVP in Dnipropetrovsk region.

edges.context: Ukrainian mafia cooperated with the Neapolitan Camorra in cigarette smuggling from Ukraine to Italy.
The Camorra Contini clan cooperated with Ukrainian groups in cigarette smuggling.
Odesa mafia cooperates with Russian mafia gangs in heroin trafficking into Europe.
